Disruption.description: Ability to disrupt offenses through blocks, steals, and deflections.

Double_def.description: STL * BLK, awarding defenders that can disrupt in multiple ways.

DistMilesDef.description: Distance covered on defense per 100 possessions.

AdjPMRim.description: FG%+- when closest defender on shots taken within 6 ft of the rim.

MatchupDiff.description: Matchup difficulty, calculated by weighted average of PTS/100 of opponents guarded.

AdjPMOut.description: FG%+- when closest defender on shots not at rim.

ClipMatchupVers.description: Matchup versatility, rewarding players that can guard multiple positions (clipped).

DistMilesDef.description: Distance covered on defense per 100 possessions.
